law: Update the variable in the file to use the developer token you create.
A good way to ensure an app UI updates automatically in response to changes is to listen for changes in the Now Playing item, as well as in the playing state.
In all navigation apps, the root template must be an instance of and contain no additional graphics or UI elements.
All overlays must be a type of template that CarPlay provides.
The map must cover the entire screen, which the sample accomplishes using constraints.
CarPlay quick-ordering apps require a CarPlay quick-ordering entitlement, which you can request .
Create an file in the project, if you don’t have one already.
Make sure that the target project setting has the path of the file.
Live Activities don’t display in CarPlay, but do provide a glanceable view on the person’s Lock Screen to inform them about updates to their order.
If your app spends significant amounts of time in the background, such as in a quick-ordering app, you need to use notifications to provide updates to people using the app.
Your app doesn’t need to support background updates, or use any cycle methods.
The service app needs a JSON Web Token (JWT) to create push notifications for use with Live Activities.

The following code example shows how the sample creates the JWT for use with the payload to send to Apple, which in turn sends a push notification to the associated device: Configure your food-ordering app to work with CarPlay.
